content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market across the board is positive: Nifty +0.58%, Bank Nifty +1.04%, Auto +1.18%, IT +1.13%, PSU Bank +1.60%, supported by strong US close (S&P +0.81%, Nasdaq +1.03%). Existing book is largely in profit (HAL, PNBHOUSING, NAVINFLUOR, ADANIPORTS, SOBHA recovering). Focus this session is to trail SLs on winners and avoid event-day stacking — DABUR results tomorrow, CHOLAHLDNG board May 8, HAL board May 14.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.7% — well above the +4% trail trigger. Current SL 1029 is only ~1.3% below CMP 1042 (too tight, risks intraday wobble stopout). Moving SL to 1015 (~2.6% below CMP, locks in +3.1% from entry of 984), keeping target 1110. SL still above breakeven, gives the position room through normal noise while protecting >50% of unrealized gain. Q4 was a beat, MOFSL Buy."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold ETF, -2.4% but SL 119 still ~2.6% below CMP — within tolerance. Geopolitical hedge thesis intact (West Asia tensions, weak INR). No change to SL/target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op equivalent — SL already at 1715, equal to current. Skipping MODIFY, treating as HOLD. (Correcting: holding existing levels.) CMP 1725, gap to SL ~0.6% is tight but acceptable since stock is at ATH and Q4 was a beat. Will trail higher if it pushes through 1750."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Auto sector strong pre-market (+1.18%), April sales record +33% YoY, M&M results positive read-through. Position -1.8% but thesis intact, SL 13400 (~1.7% below CMP) provides modest absorption. Hold through; do not exit on opening wobble — wait for data after first hour."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "new_target": 222.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 turnaround strong (PAT +68% YoY, GNPA improved 140 bps), stock made fresh 52-week high 204.44 on results day, currently consolidating at 206. Keeping SL at 204 (just below 52w high breakout level), nudging target to 222 to reflect upside given multiple broker target raises. PSU Bank index +1.6% pre-market is supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4540.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.2%, CMP 4610, current SL 4555 is ~1.2% below CMP — tight given stock has run 31% in a month. Defence sector strong, JM Financial TP 4875. However May 14 board meeting is binary catalyst — keeping size, slight SL adjustment to 4540 (still tighter than entry-based default but gives room above SMA20). Will tighten further or exit before May 14. Net new SL 4540 is below current 4555 — REVERTING to HOLD; cannot loosen SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correcting prior MODIFY: SL can only be tightened, not loosened. Current SL 4555 stays. Will reassess closer to May 14 board meeting (binary event)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5%, SL 372 (~0.8% below CMP 374.95) is tight but acceptable given sharp 60% one-month run. Q4 PAT +156% YoY, FY26 +200%. Hold; if it breaks back above 380 with volume, will trail SL up. No event in next 3 sessions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 5: PAT +125% YoY, revenue +60%, FY26 record sales Rs 8,136 cr. Net-debt negative balance sheet. Position -1.3%, SL 1420 (~2.6% below CMP) gives breathing room. Realty index +0.61% pre-market. Hold for target 1570."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.6%, CMP 7005, hit lifetime high 7200 on Apr 30. Q4 was outstanding (PAT +114%, EBITDA margin 34.2%). Geojit TP 8500. Current SL 6900 = entry (breakeven) is appropriate given the +2.6% gain. Nudging target to 7400 to reflect momentum and break above prior ATH. SL stays at breakeven — locks in capital protection."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 0,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 0,
      "stop_loss": 0,
      "target": 0,
      "confidence": 0.0,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Skipping M&M new entry — Auto exposure already via MARUTI; pre-market gap-up after Q4 print is already priced in. Adding another auto name now is cluster-stacking against the rule (1 new same-cluster max). Will revisit if it pulls back."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 1029 to 1015 — wait, 1015 is LOWER than 1029. Correcting in decisions: keeping SL at 1029 (no change) since we cannot loosen. The 1029 SL is actually 1.3% below CMP — tight but OK at this profit level. Actual action: HOLD, no SL change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position; keep SL/target intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "At ATH, SL 1715 already at breakeven-plus. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Auto strength supportive; thesis intact; SL absorption adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just entered at 209, breakeven. Q4 turnaround thesis active. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "May 14 board meeting is the next decision point; will tighten/exit closer to event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hold; reassess if reclaims 380 with volume."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 print May 5; realty index supportive; SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at entry 6900; no change. Target raised to 7400 in MODIFY to reflect ATH break momentum."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "DABUR — board meeting tomorrow May 7, binary event, NO new entry today. CHOLAHLDNG — board May 8, two sessions away, NO new entry. M&M — gap-up post-results, watching pullback to 50DMA before considering; cluster overlap with MARUTI. CAMS, VEDL, ADANIGREEN, TITAGARH, FINCABLES — monitoring; deployed capital already at 49% with multiple positions in profit, no urgent need to add. RRKABEL/POLYCAB — POLYCAB Q4 result tonight is the trigger; watch for next session.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-diversified (Financial Services, Realty, Capital Goods, Auto, Chemicals, Energy/ETF, Banking, Services). Deployed 49% / cash 51% gives ample dry powder but is above-soft-target cash level — acceptable given multiple binary events ahead (DABUR May 7, CHOLAHLDNG May 8, HAL May 14). Five wins, four losses, profit factor 2.1x — discipline is working. Priority next sessions: trail SLs on PNBHOUSING/ADANIPORTS as they extend, and pre-emptively manage HAL into May 14. No new entries today — no setup justifies adding cluster risk on a day where existing book needs SL discipline."
}
